options.a: the unresolved pressure, strain or force acting upon an individual’s physical or mental systems and the human response.
options.b: a feeling of well-being enabling difficult tasks to be completed more easily.
options.c: a physical limit acting upon the individual’s physical systems, inhibiting completion of any task.
options.d: a low level of pressure acting on the individual’s mental system, which inhibits completion of even the simplest tasks.
